---
title: "ETO5513_T2DM_Risk-Factors"
author: "Eileen Koh"
date: "2026-04-01"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    keep_md: true
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)

{r, include=TRUE}
# Load dataset 
data <- read_csv("Data/diabetes_dataset.csv")
